issues.description: Marked source=content with qty=null, but step text states 'if necessary' (conditional). Should be unresolved or clarified as optional.
Listed as quest but is actually a diary reward. Categorization acceptable but technically mixed.

notes: Items mapping is comprehensive. All actively started/progressed quests correctly listed (Swan Song start, Eagles Peak continue→complete, Making Friends start→complete). Abstract items are genuine (cash, melee gear, prayer/energy pots). Salts correctly unresolved due to multiple in-step types. Eternal brazier unresolved (acceptable ambiguity). Core accuracy high - conditional agility potion is the only meaningful data classification issue.
